CREATE TABLE sum_map_test(date Date, timeslot DateTime, statusMap Nested(status UInt8, requests UInt8));
SELECT timeslot, sumMapWithOverflow(statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) FROM sum_map_test GROUP BY timeslot;
CREATE TABLE sum_map_complex(date Date, timeslot DateTime, statusMap Nested(status UInt8, requests UInt8));
SELECT timeslot, sumMapWithOverflow(statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) FROM sum_map_complex WHERE date = '2000-01-01' GROUP BY timeslot;
WITH (SELECT statusMap.status, statusMap.requests FROM sum_map_test) AS temp_table SELECT sumMapWithOverflow(temp_table.status, temp_table.requests) AS summed_results FROM sum_map_test;
CREATE TABLE aggregate_test(date Date, statusMapNested Nested(status UInt8, requests UInt8), other_statusMap Nested(status UInt8, requests UInt8));
SELECT date, sumMapWithOverflow(statusMapNested.status, statusMapNested.requests), sumMapWithOverflow(other_statusMap.status, other_statusMap.requests) FROM aggregate_test GROUP BY date;
CREATE TABLE join_test(date Date, id UInt32, statusMap Nested(status UInt8, requests UInt8));
SELECT a.date, sumMapWithOverflow(a.statusMap.status, a.statusMap.requests) FROM join_test AS a JOIN join_test AS b ON a.id = b.id GROUP BY a.date;

SELECT timeslot, sumMapWithOverflow(statusMap.status, statusMap.requests) AS total_requests FROM (SELECT timeslot, arrayJoin(statusMap.status) AS status, arrayJoin(statusMap.requests) AS requests FROM sum_map_test) GROUP BY timeslot;
